meaning: n.叮当声adj.叮当响 的,发叮当声的
examples: Their jingling would drown thy whispers.
Ask the child to stop jingling the keys.
After a seemingly unending silence, the sound of keys jingling is picked up by the recorder.
Today, the only sound is of John jingling his pocket change, but John is always doing that.
Ms. TIANA SCOTT (Habitat for Humanity Volunteer): The best thing, absolutely best, was the dedication of the houses, and when they all had their keys and were jingling them.
